case_title: NADINE ` SAISI VS. WENDIE CHAVEZ et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BEHREND, PAUL SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR CHAVEZ, WENDIE

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-03-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT WENDIE CHAVEZ'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
